title: Update About Section Right Column to Side-by-Side McKinley School Photos

requirements.summary: Update the right column of the AboutSection component to display two images side-by-side: a historic 1902 photo of McKinley Elementary School and a current gymnasium photo, each with clear descriptive labels
acceptanceCriteria: The right column of the About section shows exactly two images displayed side-by-side horizontally.
The left image depicts McKinley Elementary School in a historic 1902 style.
The right image depicts the current gymnasium of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA.
Both images have clear descriptive labels visible beneath or overlaid on them.
The side-by-side layout is visually balanced and does not break the two-column About section layout.
Images are rendered from static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.

file_operations.description: Update the right column to replace the existing single image with a side-by-side layout displaying two images: frontend/public/assets/generated/mckinley-1902.dim_600x400.png labeled '1902' on the left, and frontend/public/assets/generated/mckinley-gymnasium-current.dim_600x400.png labeled 'Today' on the right. Maintain the two-column grid layout and ensure the images are horizontally aligned with proper spacing and labels beneath each image. Use responsive flex or grid layout to keep images balanced within the right column.
